summary: Bottom Navigation Bar implementation testing completed. All 12 features tested successfully. 4-tab bottom nav (Home, Orders, Dispatch, Profile) works correctly with orange highlight for active tabs. Nav properly hidden on admin/login/reports/create pages. Profile page shows all expected content including Admin badge, user info, and Admin Actions section. Sign Out functionality works correctly.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Bottom Navigation Bar fully implemented and tested. 4 tabs: Home (/), Orders (/orders), Dispatch (/dispatch), Profile (/profile). Orange highlight (text-orange-500) for active tab. Nav hidden on: /login, /admin, /reports, /create-order, /create-return, /system-test. Profile page shows: user info (name, phone, email, employee code), Admin badge for admin users, Department info, Admin Actions (Admin Setup, Reports links), and Sign Out button. All main pages have pb-20 padding for bottom nav clearance. Touch targets are 97.5x64px per button.
